doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_get_emin_max (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L58-L62). Two-line C body: `return MPFR_EMIN_MAX`. Returns the largest legal value the active emin (minimum exponent) may take.

MPFR_EMIN_MAX = MPFR_EXP_INVALID - 1, evaluating to +4611686018427387903 on 64-bit systems (= 2^62 - 1). The TS port hardcodes this constant.

Tag minimums per Rule 7 inapplicable; single happy case (carve-out per buildopt_float128_p precedent).
divergence_from_c: C returns mpfr_exp_t (long); TS returns bigint. Value hardcoded to +4611686018427387903 (= 2^62 - 1) per the probed system libmpfr observation.
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L58-L62 -- the C reference body.
